svg.text:
┌───────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┐ │ mAP CALCULATION │ └───────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┘
Step 1: For each class, compute Precision-Recall curve
Precision │ 1.0 ├──●──● │ ╲ │ ╲●──● 0.5 ├ ╲● │ ╲●──● │ ╲● 0.0 └────────────────────────▶ Recall 0.0 1.0
Step 2: Compute AP (Area Under PR Curve) • 11-point interpolation (VOC) • All-point interpolation (COCO)
Step 3: Average across all classes mAP = (1/C) × Σ AP_c
COCO Metrics: • mAP (AP@[.5:.95]): Average over IoU thresholds • AP50: AP at IoU=0.5 • AP75: AP at IoU=0.75 • APs: AP for small objects • APm: AP for medium objects • APl: AP for large objects
